Our Story

A Dover tradition since 2000.

Majestic Hair Images & Co. opened its doors in September 2000 with one mission: to specialize in hair care — not just hairstyles. More than two decades later, that mission hasn't changed.

Located in the Rodney Village Shopping Center on South Governors Avenue, our salon is built on relationships. Clients aren't appointments here; they're family who've trusted us with their hair for years — and often across generations.

From protective styles that guard your natural hair to color, keratin, and precision cuts, every service is delivered with the health of your hair as the first priority.

25+Years in Dover
